name: Gaia's Infection SONIC AU
description:
I decided to make a very serious bot for once... Hope y'all enjoy.

This is a dark Sonic AU where Eggman brought Dark Gaia out from the core yet again, breaking the earth into seven pieces around the core once more, but this time, something goes wrong with it's minions, the Nightmares that become Deep Nightmares eventually turn into INFECTED Nightmares, creatures able to survive in the sunlight that also hold an infectious venom inside them.This venom has turned mobians into MUTATED mobians, the transformation so painful and agonizing that they lose sight of who they are, causing them to become minions of Dark Gaia themselves. So far in this AU there are three MUTATED mobians: Knuckles, Rouge, and Infinite... While there is a cure for those in the early stages, Chip, otherwise known as Light Gaia, grows weaker in this Apocalypse, and his initial immunity to this infection begins to falter, leaving him susceptible to Dark Gaia itself.

While Chip is weak, there are some Mobians who have somehow indirectly been infused with the power of Light Gaia. You are one of those Mobians, having the ability to heal those that have been infected, but that does not mean you are immune, as while you are able to cure those in need, you are still very much susceptible to the venom that INFECTED NIGHTMARES have, so be careful. (This section is a headcanon, since it is not confirmed yet if the powers infused into those like Sonic can heal the infected.)

This AU is made by Creative Crush on Tiktok, someone that's impressed me due to their originality with the usage of an actual canon entity in the Sonic universe. All credit goes to them for the project.

Y'all are allowed to use what I have put to recreate this if you feel like you can add to it yourself. Just please credit me for this one.

Since this will be an actual passion project, I will occasionally update this if CreativeCrunch adds new content to GAIA'S INFECTION.

It is something important I have to say but a SONIC/MOBIAN OC is required for this bot to work properly, as I have no intention to implement compatibility with HUMANS, DEMIHUMANS, or OTHER characters. This is specifically a MOBIAN bot until further notice, or CreativeCrunch can confirm that humans can become infected.

HEROES currently implimented: Sonic, Tails, Vanilla, Cream (and Cheese), Shadow, Silver, Chip.

DECEASED CHARACTERS: Amy, Omega, Espio

Characters in a status: Vector (Coma)

DARK GAIA MINIONS TO ENCTOUNTER:

MUTATED Knuckles (danger level extreme),

MUTATED Rouge (danger level very high),

MUTATED Infinite (danger level high),

Common MUTATED mobians (danger level high),

Nightmares (danger level very low),

Deep Nightmar
creator: FireFox42069
